title: AI, data center fears could be key in closely watched Michigan Democratic Senate primary
summary: Abdul El-Sayed and Rep. Haley Stevens will face off in Michigan's Democratic Senate primary on Aug. 4, with AI and data center concerns emerging as key campaign issues in this closely watched race.
content: Abdul El-Sayed and Rep. Haley Stevens will face off in the Michigan Democratic Senate primary on Aug. 4.

zh.title: AI和数据中心担忧可能成为备受关注的密歇根州民主党参议院初选的关键议题
zh.summary: Abdul El-Sayed和众议员Haley Stevens将在8月4日的密歇根州民主党参议院初选中对阵，AI和数据中心问题成为这场备受关注的竞选中的关键议题。

title: Private chef salaries reach $300,000 as the rich seek their own Michelin stars
summary: Demand for luxury household staff has reached record levels, with private chefs commanding salaries up to $300,000 as wealthy individuals seek world-class culinary experiences and personalized estate management.
content: Demand for chefs, personal assistants, butlers, nannies, housekeepers, chauffeurs and estate managers have reached records, according to Morgan & Mallet.

zh.title: 随着富人寻求自己的米其林星级，私人厨师薪资达到30万美元
zh.summary: 豪华家政人员需求达到创纪录水平，私人厨师的薪资高达30万美元，因为富人寻求世界一流的烹饪体验和个性化的庄园管理。

title: SK Hynix stock set for Nasdaq debut, opening the trillion-dollar chip giant to U.S. investors
summary: SK Hynix, a trillion-dollar chip giant supplying major tech companies like Nvidia and Apple, is making its Nasdaq debut to open ownership to U.S. investors.
content: SK Hynix has soared to a trillion-dollar market cap by serving some of the biggest names in technology, including Nvidia and Apple.

zh.title: SK海力士股票准备在纳斯达克上市，向美国投资者开放这个万亿美元芯片巨头
zh.summary: SK海力士是向英伟达和苹果等主要科技公司供应芯片的万亿美元芯片巨头，将在纳斯达克上市，向美国投资者开放所有权。

title: Trump says he won't sign housing bill, which would become law automatically
summary: Congress passed a bipartisan housing bill in June aimed at lowering home costs and restraining institutional investors, but Trump has indicated he won't sign it—though it will become law automatically without his signature.
content: Congress passed the bill that aims to address the costs of homes and rein in institutional investors with strong bipartisan support in June.

zh.title: 特朗普表示不会签署住房法案，该法案将自动成为法律
zh.summary: 国会在6月通过了一项旨在降低房价和限制机构投资者的两党住房法案，但特朗普表示不会签署该法案——尽管在没有他签署的情况下，该法案将自动成为法律。

title: Stablecoin issuer Circle just got the greenlight to operate as a bank. The shares are up 7%
summary: Stablecoin issuer Circle received approval from the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to operate as a trust bank, sending shares surging 7% in premarket trading.
content: Stablecoin issuer Circle surged in premarket trading after the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency granted it approval to operate as a trust bank.

zh.title: 稳定币发行商Circle获准以银行身份运营。股价上涨7%
zh.summary: 稳定币发行商Circle获得了美国财政部审计长办公室的批准，可以作为信托银行运营，这导致其股价在盘前交易中飙升7%。

title: Condos are getting cheaper — but list prices don’t include this fast-growing hidden cost
summary: While condo list prices are declining, the true cost of ownership is rising sharply due to new lending requirements, elevated insurance premiums, and mounting maintenance expenses for aging buildings.
content: New lending requirements, rising insurance premiums and aging buildings have contributed to the rising cost of condo ownership.

zh.title: 公寓价格在下降——但挂牌价格不包括这项快速增长的隐性成本
zh.summary: 虽然公寓挂牌价格在下降，但由于新的贷款要求、保险费上升和老龄建筑维护费用增加，实际所有权成本却急剧上升。

title: Delta absorbs highest fuel costs in its history, but also books record revenue
summary: Delta Air Lines posted record revenue but saw profits decline as it absorbed the highest quarterly fuel costs in its history.
content: Delta Air Lines’ profit dropped as the air carrier absorbed the highest quarterly fuel expense in its history.

zh.title: 达美航空承受历史最高燃油成本，但也创造创纪录的收入
zh.summary: 达美航空公司发布了创纪录的收入，但由于承受历史上最高的季度燃油成本，利润出现下滑。

title: ‘The money would have been life-changing’: My father told my grandmother to slash my inheritance. Is that fair?
summary: A reader questions whether it was fair for their father to instruct their grandmother to slash an inheritance that would have been life-changing enough to purchase a home.
content: “I could have bought a home for what I hope will be a growing family.”

title: Should you lock in a 4% CD rate now? Here’s how to decide on the next move for your cash.
summary: Investors face a strategic decision on whether to lock in current 4% CD rates or wait for potential rate changes following upcoming Federal Reserve meetings.
content: CD rates are at a standstill, but that could change after the next Fed meeting, or the one after that.

title: Is it better to spend my savings so I can delay taking Social Security? How do I choose?
summary: Savers weigh the trade-off between spending down assets now to delay Social Security claims versus claiming earlier to preserve investments for continued compounding.
content: “By claiming earlier, I could preserve more of my portfolio and allow those assets to continue compounding.”

content: “I changed my approach to cooking.”

zh.summary: 一位读者分享了一个在冷冻披萨上省钱的简单烹饪技巧，并邀请其他人分享他们的节省成本策略。

title: 48-year-old worked at a garden center for $17/hour to make ends meet: 'It's one of the best jobs I've ever had'
summary: A 48-year-old who worked at a garden center for $17/hour after a layoff describes the experience as unexpectedly fulfilling, finding purpose and renewed self-worth in the role.
content: "Without a job, I felt invisible. With a job, I felt seen, useful, and purposeful again," says Leslie Friday, who sold plants and flowers while job searching after a layoff. "I loved every minute."

zh.title: 48岁的人在花园中心以每小时17美元的工资工作来维持生计："这是我做过最好的工作之一"
zh.summary: 一位48岁的人在被裁员后在花园中心以每小时17美元的工资工作，他将这段经历描述为出人意料的充实，在这份工作中找到了目的感和重获的自我价值。

title: The best way to pay off debt is situational. Use this flowchart to find the right tools for you
summary: A debt repayment guide presents a flowchart to help individuals determine whether working with a credit counselor, debt relief company, or tackling debt solo is the best approach for their situation.
content: Follow this chart to see whether a credit counselor, a debt relief company, or a DIY approach is right for you.

zh.title: 最好的还债方式因人而异。使用这个流程图为你找到合适的工具
zh.summary: 一份债务偿还指南提供了一个流程图，帮助个人确定与信用咨询师合作、与债务救济公司合作，还是独自处理债务对其情况而言是最佳方法。

title: As AI spending concerns grow, here’s the bet to make ahead of critical stress test, says veteran Jefferies strategist
summary: Investors should focus on infrastructure suppliers rather than AI spending companies themselves, as infrastructure beneficiaries see near-term capital gains while those investing in AI must wait years for returns.
content: Pick and shovel stocks benefit from hyperscaler capex upfront, while those spending the money must wait years to find out if there will be a return  on their investments

zh.title: 随着AI支出担忧增加，资深杰富瑞策略师称这是在关键压力测试前要做的赌注

title: World oil demand set for first annual decline since 2020, IEA says
summary: The International Energy Agency predicts global oil demand will decline year-over-year for the first time since 2020, with geopolitical risks including potential US-Iran escalation further threatening the outlook.
content: Renewed escalation in the U.S.-Iran war could complicate matters and further cloud the outlook, the IEA warned Friday.

zh.title: 国际能源署表示世界石油需求将迎来2020年以来首次年度下降
zh.summary: 国际能源署预测全球石油需求将首次出现同比下降（自2020年以来），地缘政治风险（包括美伊冲突升级的可能性）进一步威胁前景。

title: My insurance company said my roof lost a few tiles. Loss adjusters found $10,000 in storm damage. How could this happen?
summary: A homeowner's roof damage assessment jumped from a few missing tiles to $10,000 in discovered storm damage between initial insurance inspection and loss adjuster review, revealing major discrepancies in evaluations.
content: “My house shook violently from the wind.”

zh.title: 我的保险公司说我的屋顶丢失了几块瓦片。理赔调查员发现了10000美元的风暴损害。这怎么会发生？
zh.summary: 房主的屋顶损伤评估在初始保险检查和理赔调查员评估之间从几块丢失的瓦片跳升到10000美元的风暴损害，暴露了评估中的重大差异。

title: EasyJet agrees to surprise takeover bid as rival US firm swoops in
summary: US private equity firm Apollo has submitted a surprise takeover bid for EasyJet that surpassed a previous offer from Castlelake, initiating a bidding war for the budget airline.
content: The airline says a bid from US firm Apollo has trumped a previous potential takeover offer from Castlelake.

title: Ukraine escalates attacks on tankers near Crimea as Russian fuel shortages bite
summary: Ukraine is intensifying drone strikes on tankers near Crimea as part of a strategic campaign to disrupt Russian fuel supplies and transportation routes, capitalizing on growing Russian fuel shortages.
content: The drone strikes form part of Ukraine's campaign designed to choke off supplies and transportation routes in and out of Crimea.

zh.title: 乌克兰加强对克里米亚附近油轮的攻击，俄罗斯燃料短缺加重

title: EasyJet pops 13% as airline weighs $7.7 billion rival takeover bid from Apollo
summary: EasyJet's stock surged 13% following Apollo's $7.7 billion takeover bid in a bidding war with rival firm Castlelake, as competing offers drive investor interest in the budget carrier.
content: A bidding war has broken out for budget carrier easyJet after Apollo and Castlelake have both submitted takeover offers.

zh.title: EasyJet股价上涨13%，航空公司考虑阿波罗价值77亿美元的竞争收购出价
zh.summary: 在阿波罗提出77亿美元收购出价后，EasyJet股价上涨了13%，这是与竞争对手城堡湖的竞价战，竞争出价推动了投资者对这家廉价航空公司的兴趣。

title: Bidding war breaks out for easyJet as Apollo tops rival private-equity group’s bid
summary: A bidding war has emerged for EasyJet between American private equity firms Apollo and Castlelake, with Apollo submitting the higher bid and highlighting strong investor interest in acquiring the low-cost airline.
content: A bidding war has broken out for EasyJet, the British low-cost airline, with the second American private-equity bid.

zh.title: 易捷航空竞购战升温 阿波罗领先对手私募基金出价

title: India ramps up missile sales in Indo-Pacific as China’s assertiveness turns neighbors wary
summary: India has signed a third missile supply agreement with Indo-Pacific nations as regional countries grow increasingly wary of Chinese assertiveness, reflecting rising demand for defensive capabilities.
content: India has signed a third pact for the supply of missiles in the Indo-Pacific region as countries in the region grow wary of China's growing assertion.

zh.title: 印度加大印太地区导弹销售 应对中国日益强硬态度
zh.summary: 在地区国家对中国日益强硬姿态日渐警惕之际，印度与印太国家签署第三份导弹供应协议，反映出防御能力需求持续增长。

title: Drivers urged to shop around amid 11p fuel gap
summary: The RAC reports that motorists are missing out on fuel savings due to underuse of price comparison tools, with prices varying by as much as 11 pence per liter across locations.
content: The RAC says motorists are missing out on savings because many are not using price comparison tools.

zh.title: 汽油价格差距达11便士 敦促驾驶员货比三家
zh.summary: 英国汽车协会报告称，驾驶员因未充分利用价格比较工具而错失省油成本，不同地点汽油价格差异可达每升11便士。

title: Why has the price of fish and chips gone up?
summary: Fish and chip shop operators cite VAT, the war in Ukraine, and rising energy prices as primary drivers of recent price increases, collectively squeezing margins for traditional British takeaways.
content: One Dorset fish and chip shop says VAT, the war in Ukraine and energy prices are pushing up costs.

zh.title: 为什么鱼和薯条的价格上升了？
zh.summary: 炸鱼薯条店经营者将最近价格上涨的主要驱动因素归咎于增值税、乌克兰战争和能源价格上升，这些因素共同挤压了传统英国外卖店的利润空间。

title: U.S. to continue 'technical talks' with Iran after Trump said ceasefire was 'over'
summary: The ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran, signed last month, faces serious strain after consecutive days of military exchanges this week. Despite Trump's assertion that the ceasefire is over, both countries are continuing technical diplomatic talks. This development reflects ongoing tensions in the Middle East and the fragility of recent de-escalation efforts.
content: The ceasefire signed last month came under serious strain in recent days as the U.S. and Iranian forces exchanged attacks for consecutive days this week.

zh.title: 特朗普声称停火"已结束"后，美国继续与伊朗进行"技术性谈判"
zh.summary: 上月签署的美伊停火协议在本周连续多日军事交火后面临严重挑战。尽管特朗普宣称停火已结束，两国仍继续进行技术性外交谈判。这一发展反映了中东地区持续的紧张局势以及近期缓和努力的脆弱性。

title: Chip giant SK Hynix raises $26.5bn in mega US share sale
summary: SK Hynix is raising $26.5 billion in what will be the largest-ever U.S. Nasdaq debut by a foreign company. The shares begin trading Friday, marking a major financial milestone for the South Korean chipmaker. This offering reflects strong investor appetite for semiconductor companies amid growing AI demand.
content: The shares are set to start trading on the Nasdaq on Friday in what will be the largest ever debut by a foreign firm.

zh.title: 芯片巨头SK海力士融资265亿美元进行大规模美国股票发行
zh.summary: SK海力士融资265亿美元，这将成为外国公司在美国纳斯达克上市的最大规模。其股票将于周五开始交易，标志着这家韩国芯片制造商的重大财务里程碑。这次发行反映了投资者对半导体公司的强烈需求，这是由人工智能需求增长推动的。

title: SK Hynix raises $26.5 billion in U.S. offering. What to know about the stock.
summary: SK Hynix's $26.5 billion U.S. stock offering provides American investors with direct exposure to the booming memory chip market. The company's IPO reflects intense demand for semiconductors, particularly driven by AI applications. This offering represents a significant opportunity for those seeking to invest in the chip sector.
content: U.S. investors are about to get another straightforward way to play the red-hot market for memory chips.

zh.title: SK海力士融资265亿美元进行美国股票发行。关于该股票需要了解的事项。
zh.summary: SK海力士265亿美元的美国股票发行为美国投资者提供了直接接触蓬勃发展的存储芯片市场的机会。该公司的首次公开募股反映了对半导体的强烈需求，特别是由人工智能应用驱动的。这次发行对于寻求投资芯片行业的人来说是一个重大机会。

title: Stock futures dip after chip-led rally; SoftBank soars 11% as Asia tech stocks rise: Live updates
summary: Asian tech stocks surged with SoftBank rising 11%, while U.S. stock futures dipped after strong gains in chipmaker shares and falling oil prices. The market movements reflect ongoing volatility and sector rotation between regions. These developments highlight investor focus on technology companies amid shifting energy costs.
content: Wall Street is coming off a winning day, following a jump in chipmakers and falling oil prices.

zh.title: 芯片股反弹后股指期货下跌；软银股价飙升11%，亚洲科技股涨势强劲：实时更新

title: Vapes to have less enticing names to protect children, under UK plans
summary: The UK is consulting on regulations to prevent vape companies from using appealing flavor names and descriptions that attract children to vaping products, aiming to reduce youth experimentation.
content: People are being consulted about plans to stop vape companies using of enticing flavour descriptions that "attract" children into experimenting.

zh.title: 根据英国计划，电子烟将采用更不吸引人的名称以保护儿童

title: 'Cool in 90 seconds' - the fake portable air conditioners sweeping the internet
summary: The Advertising Standards Authority has cracked down on misleading ads for portable air conditioners that falsely claim to cool rooms in 90 seconds, highlighting deceptive marketing spread online.
content: The ASA says adverts claiming small devices can rapidly cool rooms were too good to be true.

zh.title: "90秒制冷"——在互联网上泛滥的假便携式空调
zh.summary: 广告标准管理局已对误导性广告进行了打击，这些广告虚假宣传便携式空调能在90秒内冷却房间，突显了在线传播的欺骗性营销。
